exercises.title: Stabilizer Code Validator
exercises.description: Verify that a set of generators defines a valid stabilizer code.
tasks: Check all generators have correct length n
Check generators are independent (none is product of others)
hints: Independence: check rank of generator matrix

exercises.title: Logical Operator Finder
exercises.description: Find logical operators for a given stabilizer code.
tasks: Given generators, find Paulis in normalizer
Find independent logical X and Z operators
Verify they anticommute with each other
hints: Logical ops commute with all generators
For k=1: need one X̄ and one Z̄

exercises.title: Distance Calculator
exercises.description: Compute the distance of a stabilizer code.
tasks: Check each for commutation with stabilizers
Identify those not in stabilizer group
hints: Check: is it in stabilizer group?

exercises.title: Code Space Basis Builder
exercises.description: Construct an explicit basis for the code space.
tasks: Visualize basis states for small codes
